message:
feat(ensemble): implement mode loader with multi-source precedence (bd-qn9gc)

Add ModeLoader that merges reasoning modes from embedded catalog,
user config (~/.config/ntm/modes.toml), and project config
(.ntm/modes.toml) with proper precedence (project > user > embedded).
Includes LoadModeCatalog() convenience function, thread-safe
GlobalCatalog() singleton via sync.Once, and Source field on
ReasoningMode for provenance tracking. User/project modes default
to advanced tier when unspecified.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
